transcript: Hello, this is, uh, Brad. UPS.
And, um... I just wanted to let you know, we got our, uh... truck ready out there. [inhale] Got your millipedes ready to bring to you.
We've got your millipedes ready for ya.
And... so, I'm just curious to what time of day is... best on it.
[laughing] Well, just a second. You... you've got me at a loss. Maybe you're talking about something that [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joanna_Shimkus my wife] arranged. Uhh...
That could be, that could be.
And... you... who are you again? What company?
Could you hold one second, please?
I have my wife on the other line. What is the name of that stuff? "Millipede"?
Yeah, and it's, uh... probably... probably like fifteen hundred millipedes in here.
It's... it's gonna be about eight hundred, forty four dollars even.
Eight hundred and forty four dollars even?
It came all the way from Taiwan, so...
Well, they probably... hold on a second. [laughing]
Yeah, look... one of our guys just got bit by one of these things, I... I...
We need to know where they're goin'. What part of the building here, or whatever.
What building are you talking about?
Your building, or your establishment, or, you know, what have you.
Well, what address do you have?
Hello, Sidney? I think we got cut off there. Um...
Uh... eh... uh... yeah... uh... [laughing] ...you're either a nuts, or this is a big joke, and it's very funny...
No, it's... neither of the above. It's... it's an order that we just frankly want to get off our dock, it's... becoming kind of a nuisance out here.
Well, why don't you... why don't you send it back? Because... nobody in this house ordered any millipedes.
[sigh] I mean, did you just change your mind on the order, or... you know, what's going on?
Yeah, I... no, I don't know what's going with on you. You can't even tell me what my address is.
Well, I've got it down here, I mean, it's...
...it's fifteen hundred live millipedes in a, in a...
